# MK QuizFlow

> MK QuizFlow turns PDFs and pasted notes into quizzes and flashcards, in your browser. The deterministic Quick mode works with zero AI keys; an optional AI layer produces reworded questions. Local-first: documents are never stored server-side, and all user data lives in the browser via IndexedDB.

Site: https://quizflow.mkazi.live
Author: Kazi Musharraf (https://www.mkazi.live)
Source: https://github.com/mk-knight23/35-tool-pdf-to-quiz
License: MIT

## Key features
- Local-first processing: browser-side PDF text extraction with pdf.js. No document is uploaded or stored on a server.
- Quick mode: deterministic keyword-heuristic questions generated locally, no AI keys or network calls.
- AI mode: multiple choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, and short-answer sets via the Vercel AI Gateway, with honest degradation and optional bring-your-own-key.
- Flashcards: spaced-repetition self-grading (Again, Hard, Good, Easy) stored in IndexedDB.
- Weak-topic analysis: groups your missed questions into topics from local results only.

## Primary pages
- [Create quizzes](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/tool): upload a PDF or paste text, configure, generate, play.
- [Flashcards](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/flashcards): study decks with spaced repetition.
- [Dashboard](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/dashboard): real local study stats.
- [Docs](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/docs): how the app works.
- [FAQ](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/faq): privacy, PDF support, keys, storage.
- [Creator](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/creator): about Kazi Musharraf.
- [Privacy](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/privacy) and [Cookies](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/cookies): data handling and consent.

## Guides
- [How to Study Effectively with Active Recall](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/guides/how-to-study)
- [Spaced Repetition for Exam Prep](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/guides/spaced-repetition)
- [How to Extract Text from Complex PDFs Locally](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/guides/text-extraction)
- [Cloze Deletion vs. Multiple Choice](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/guides/question-types)
- [Creating Classroom Handouts from Lecture Notes](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/guides/classroom-handouts)
- [Preparing for Professional Certifications](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/guides/certifications)

## Use cases
- [Exam preparation for students](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/use-cases/exam-prep)
- [Creating classroom handouts](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/use-cases/teaching-handouts)
- [Studying for professional certifications](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/use-cases/certification-study)
- [Employee onboarding knowledge checks](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/use-cases/onboarding-training)
- [Vocabulary and terminology acquisition](https://quizflow.mkazi.live/use-cases/language-vocab)

## Tech stack
- Next.js (App Router), strict TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
- IndexedDB via the idb package for local persistence
- Vercel AI SDK with Vercel AI Gateway model strings
